review_title: Very Good SEO Tool for everyone interested in SEO!
description: Overall it's probably one of the most intuitives tools for SEO specialists, experts and hobbyist with large base of most important data.
author: Paweł J.
pros: SENUTO is constantly working on the development and search for new tools that will help facilitate the work of every SEO specialist and hobbyist.
cons: You can expect occasional technical issues with this tool, but I can see them becoming less frequent and less annoying.

description: Using a single tool, I can quickly identify what is important in a given month for each of our brands. I have also been able to very easily identify who our competitors are and who the most serious competition is. Thanks to Senuto, I have produced a report that explains what needs to be improved, what needs to be abandoned and what needs to be introduced into our operations.
author: Marcin H.
pros: The most helpful tool for me is the text support tool. In addition, it has been very useful to learn about keywords and identify my company's competitors.
cons: Downloading reports and tables were problematic. Not all the information was there and it was much better if I transcribed the things I was interested in into the report myself.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Senuto reviewed by a user (project manager)
description: Relation price/quality matches the minimum requirements. You get what you paid for
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Is quite cheaper compared to other options in the market
cons: 1. Very poor UX and unfriendly interface 2. Integrations are not easy to set up 3. Doesn't have some basic features such as keyword position change 4. Reports have to be created with an external tool such as data studio and it doesn't work properly
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Thanks to Senuto, we have sorted out our SEO and keyword planning strategy as iPresso. In addition, the tool supports us in content planning. These two things have given us a huge value.
author: Maciej M.
pros: Senuto is a very intuitive and easy-to-use tool. The tool brings me tremendous value because of the comprehensiveness of the solution - starting from analyzing your site and your competitors to developing content through dedicated tools and finally measuring the results. Everything you need in one place!
cons: At this point, it's hard for me to, to anything. I have not encountered such an aspect of the Senuto system.

review_title: Necessary SEO Tool for Eastern Europe
description: It's a great tool for monitoring SEO tactics - loss and wins in keywords and SEO Visibility trends.
author: Pawel K.
pros: The best parts of this tool are: 1. SEO Visibility 2. Keyword Tracking 3. Keyword Research tools. For me, it's my daily routine to check my clients' visibility every morning :)
cons: The tool has a very big problem with the mobile version - doesn't have it all. Unfortunately, it seems to be a very big mistake in 2020...

description: I would love to buy it and use it daily
author: Dominika T.
pros: Best tool I used for marketing my personal brand
cons: Price is here the biggest issue for me. Not that they don't deserve to earn that much, more like it's too much for a freelancer like me.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: I'm in love with Senuto, using daily. Can't imagine morning without coffee and Senuto!
author: Mateusz D.
pros: My favorite is visibility analysis, rank tracker and keyword explorer
cons: I think that pixel scoring in SERPS could be useful for user.

review_title: Best tool for daily SEO analys in Poland
description: Very good, i'm a client from very early time of the project. I have resign from other tools for stats, because of the Senuto
author: Piotr C.
pros: Easy to use, new Features every year, easy and open contact for new features.
cons: There is no database for Tier1 countrys.

description: Senuto is one of the basic tools I use every day.
author: Michał S.
pros: A large database of Polish keywords, competition domain visibility reports.
cons: Occasionally there are performance problems with the tool.

description: Easy tracking the campaign progress, reporting but also integrating the data with the company internal tools.
author: Krzysztof K.
pros: - frequent updates and new functionalities - good, fast support - API and integrations - delivers a huge amount of data and saves time - affordable prices
cons: Nothing serious, I'd love to see more integrations in the future, including MatterMost, Telegram, etc., but these are addons at the moment.

review_title: Best keyword tool ever for PL
description: I love it! I can't imagine working with seo without this tool! It is second to none on the Polish market. The Senuto crew is doing a great job ; )
author: Karolina Ł.
pros: Senuto is accurate and shows both google trends and the true value of your keywords perfectly. There is no better tool for the Polish market. An additional plus is the transparency and the whole and user-friendliness
cons: updates are weekly - could be more often the keyword gap option would also be nice

description: I use it almost every day and I can't imagine working without this software.
author: Paulina S.
pros: Using Senuto is hassle free. Functions such as Writer, keyword finding and competition analysis are very useful in everyday work
cons: I dream of extending the writer function.

description: We use Senuto in the editorial planning process on a daily basis as well as in analysis.
author: Marek S.
pros: I like most easy to use and friendly dashboard.
cons: Lack of onboarding. There was no support and training for new users.

description: Senuto helped me understand why not all my pages and subpages are positioned as I would like
author: Łukasz K.
pros: The application is very intuitive to use, you do not have to waste time setting parameters immediately you can work on it
cons: There is no such thing, the software is carefully thought out so I use it

review_title: Great tool for any seo freelancer
author: Bartosz S.
pros: A great tool for any SEO freelancer. Clear position results, a good keyword search engine and a great promising content writing tool that is still being developed
cons: The only thing that I think could have been better is a clearer presentation of word comparisons with competitors, and the ability to choose which sites are considered for competitive analysis when using the content creation tool

description: An inseparable SEO tool for several years.
author: Marcin M.
pros: The visibility analysis at Google.pl is at a high level. The cannibalisation search module is also a valuable source of information.
cons: Only 5 words can be added to the keyword database. Sometimes it's not enough.

review_title: Essential tool not only for copywriters
description: Keywords, dealing with competitors, campaign improvement and cost-saving tool both for experienced marketing team members as well as for beginners. Once you have Senuto, you can't imagine making on-line campaigns & copywriting without it.
author: Piotr K.
pros: Easiness and comprehensiveness. Tool essential for campaig planners, copywriters and all companies interested in SEO campaigns. Also enables to improve campaign and cost effectiveness.
cons: No such thing. Product is well suited for the needs of small in-house marketing team.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Value of Senuto when running an SEO campaign for a furniture store
author: Robert R.
pros: Greatest advantages of Senuto: variety of functions, intuitive interface, quality of support, good balance between quality and price, integration with Google Analitics.
cons: Sometimes the responsiveness could be better

description: better work for my clients
author: Daniel Z.
pros: good key searcher, better than in another tools
cons: maybe... i don't know. It is just ok to me.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Great software!
author: Krystian B.
pros: Senuto software is a great SEO multi-tool. You can monitor your key words, check rankings and much much more!
cons: Nothing, all is good. Price is just fine.

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: All the features are in one place and easy to find.
cons: Lots of pricing stages, some functions could be changed there

author: Jacek S.
pros: Competitive analysis and monitoring, lots of useful reports and valuable data. Focus on keyword research, this tool doesn't want to be another "all in one" which is good.
cons: In my mind a bit of lack user friendlyness, but maybe I am too old for this....
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: For my business Senuto is a great tool. It's nice that they are developing new features,and want to go abroad to a different countries. I hardly recommend Senuto.
author: Maciej C.
pros: Easy to use and learn. It's a good tool to compare your site with competition.
cons: Charts are not so readible when You want to compare with 5 or more competitors.

review_title: Senuto is a must-have for copywriters
author: Agnieszka Z.
pros: I like the speed and ease with which I can look up keywords, how often they are used and what they are related to.
cons: Website data could be updated more often than weekly.

description: So far so good!
author: Kamil S.
pros: Visibility Analysis and Compare with other sites.
cons: User experience on the platform could be better.
